race.description: Kennards Hire Wagga Battlers Cup (Bm50) Hcp
race.comment: TERESPRIT (15) turned things around last start when a barnstorming winner at Gundagai. Don't usually see them win like that there, so sticking with her. TALUK (7) is building towards a win with placings at her last two runs, the latest effort a third over 1400m here. Will likely drift back from her draw and be charging late. LIQUOR TALK (2) returns and has his first start for the Byrne stable. Boasts a solid record over this journey and should have enough early dash to spear across and land on speed from the wide draw. Reunites with the 2kg claimer who has already partnered to two wins. Not taking lightly. ICONIC ROSE (8) will be hoping they overdo it early doors so she can launch a late challenge.
